summary: TWO_COLUMN cross-entropy loss for 5-class classification with true=class 2. LEFT axes with 5 colored probability bars + YELLOW star marker on true class; ValueTracker p_tr sweeps true-class probability through {0.2, 0.5, 0.8, 0.95, 0.05, 0.2}; always_redraw. RIGHT axes with BLUE -log p curve + RED tracking dot. Live L=-log p_true.
